name: Tuna Toasties
recipeIngredient: 220 g can of tuna or skinless salmon
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first four ingredients and mix well.
2. Brush both sides of slices of bread with melted butter.
3. Spread tuna filling on each slice, roll up diagonally, secure with a toothpick, sprinkle with paprika. Bake at 200°C for 10-15 minutes.
TO MAKE COCONUT MILK:
1. Soak 1 cup desiccated coconut in 1 cup warm water for 15 minutes.
2. Drain and squeeze out all liquid from the coconut.
3. Use immediately or discard the coconut; yields about 1 cup.
